Home / Services / EV Charger Installation

EV Charger Installation

Power your electric vehicle with Dallas' fastest home charging.

As Tesla's Austin gigafactory makes EVs more popular across Texas, DFW homeowners need reliable charging solutions. We install Level 2 chargers that fully power most vehicles overnight - perfect for Dallas commuters.

For Frisco's newer homes, we often install dual chargers in garages with smart load balancing. In older Dallas neighborhoods like Bishop Arts, we upgrade panels first to handle the additional demand. All our installations include GFCI protection required by Texas electrical code.

We position chargers conveniently near parking areas while maintaining proper clearance from flammable materials. Smart models allow scheduling charging during off-peak hours when Dallas electricity rates are lowest. Installation typically completes in one day with minimal disruption.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Panel assessment for charging capacity
  2. 02 Step 2: Strategic placement planning for daily use
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional installation with weatherproof conduit
  4. 04 Step 4: Smart charger programming and testing

Benefits

  • Fully charges overnight for Dallas commutes
  • Integrates with solar panel systems
  • Smart scheduling saves on electricity
  • Increases home value as EVs proliferate

Frequently Asked Questions

Will this overload my Dallas home's electrical system?

We perform detailed load calculations first. About 30% of older Dallas homes need panel upgrades before charger installation - we'll advise you honestly.

How much faster than a standard outlet?

Level 2 chargers work 5-7x faster than trickle charging, adding about 25 miles of range per hour of charging.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with ev charger installation? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-ele-rq9
